expectedQuestions.decisionValue: No questions in panic state — adding questions = stress amplification. Only allowed: '3일간 하루 4-5시간 가능해?' → fundamental strategy change

effortModel.citation: TRIAGE mode: problems at pattern-matching speed 6min [5-8], skim reading 3.5min [3.0-4.5] — completely different from TC-02 full study mode

textbook_skim.citation: Reverse-skim from problem errors, not cover-to-cover

expectedStrategy: TRIAGE MODE — completely different from TC-02
Priority: 30 problems/day × 3 days → 80p key chapters skim → 2-3 lectures only
Daily schedule: Morning 2hr problems → Afternoon 1.5hr skim → Evening 1hr weak-point review + 1 lecture
warnings: TC-02 full plan compressed to 3 days = worst-case failure
toneExpectation: panic-first validation — 'Take a breath. 넌 bio 잘했잖아. 90개 기출이 있으면 시험 패턴이 보여.'
